text:

Replace "design" with "prompting" and this reads exactly the same.

Replace it with "coding." Replace it with "writing." Replace it with "research." Same argument every time.

Looks like China’s robotics stock sector went up and 688017 hit 20% limit up?

I appreciate they called me “Overseas God”. https://t.co/mdASEvmsj0
